overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit plazas, towering corporate architecture, and dense urban environments. The player character navigates through open public spaces, ascends wide staircases between buildings, and explores narrow alleyways before emerging into a palm-tree lined plaza with a massive tower overhead.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a neon-lit urban plaza at night, featuring a large anime billboard and Japanese text painted on the red pavement. Two NPCs sit on a green bench to the left as the camera walks forward toward a stairway in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide staircase between modern buildings, ascending toward a narrow passage above. An NPC descends the stairs toward the camera while the plaza elements fall behind.

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open plaza with potted palm trees, the camera reveals a breathtaking view of a massive corporate tower with green and orange accents. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the architecture before continuing forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the plaza toward a wide staircase leading to a commercial building. More pedestrians are visible walking in various directions as the massive tower falls behind and the street-level shops come into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban plaza through a series of architectural transitions, eventually opening into a grand corporate square. It begins on red pavement beneath a large anime billboard, moving past pedestrians on a green bench toward a distant stairway. As the camera ascends the wide stairs between modern buildings, the open plaza falls away, leading the viewer into a narrow alleyway enclosed by tall walls and vending machines beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then expands as the camera emerges into a bright plaza lined with potted palm trees, tilting upward to reveal the immense scale of a corporate tower accented in green and orange. Finally, the camera moves past the tower toward a wide staircase and street-level shops, blending into the flow of pedestrians navigating the commercial district.
